mappings.rationale: Directly covers computers, programming systems, and applications of digital computing, core topics in the section.
Covers computer languages, software systems, and the foundational science behind information processing.
Covers the historical development from calculating devices through electromechanical calculators to modern computers.
Directly covers developments in artificial intelligence including expert systems, natural-language processing, computer vision, and robotics.
Directly addresses communication and information theory, and the nature of information processing covered in this section.
Relevant to information processing systems, database management, and large-scale data storage and retrieval.
Directly covers encryption and decryption techniques, signal security, and the history of cryptology.
Relevant to electronic networks, telecommunications systems, and the interconnection of communication systems.
Directly covers still photography, motion-picture photography, and the technology of image capture.
Relevant to book, newspaper, and magazine publishing, and modern communications media.
Relevant to AI developments including robotics, listed as part of artificial intelligence advances.
Relevant to sound recording and reproducing devices and the technological transformation of audio media.
Relevant to sensing devices, transducers, and pattern recognition in information processing systems.
Relevant to optical systems for recording and reproducing, holography, and optoelectronic components.
Relevant to semiconductor devices, integrated circuits, and the solid-state physics underlying electronic components.
Relevant to radio communications, radar, sonar, and the wave physics underlying telecommunications systems.
Relevant to sound recording devices, phonographs, audio tape systems, and high-fidelity concepts.
Relevant to detection, remote sensing, and electronic monitoring systems described in the section.
Relevant to motion-picture photography and the technology of film production and projection.
Relevant to natural-language processing in artificial intelligence and communication theory.
Relevant to integrated circuits and miniature arrays of interconnected circuit elements including microprocessors.
Relevant to the development of new information and communication technologies and their societal impacts.
Relevant to publishing, printing, and the legal frameworks governing information systems and communications content.
Relevant to printing machines and processes, production of printing plates, and photocomposition.
